name: pilot-core
description: Shared governance for full-stack Microsoft projects: stack detection and scaffolding, security audit/fix pipelines (/fsp-init, /fsp-audit, /fsp-fix, /fsp-learn), MCP discovery, dependency supply-chain and license policy, CI secret scanning, REST API design standards, SLO-gated load testing, incident-response runbooks, test-data management, ADR discipline, dev onboarding, search-service integration, and the @fullstack-support triage agent that routes any symptom to the right specialist
